definitions.text: få noe ned i luftrøret som skulle i spiserøret
definitions.translation: to get something down the wrong passage (trachea instead of esophagus)

examples.en: get food down the wrong pipe

examples.no: han fikk en kjøttbit i vrangstrupen
examples.en: he got a piece of meat down the wrong pipe

examples.no: jeg har fått all religion i vrangstrupen
examples.en: I've had enough of all religion

examples.no: hun satte kaffen i vrangstrupen da hun fikk vite det
examples.en: she nearly choked on her coffee when she found out
